enforcement:codex_terms.title: Progressive Prod-Ready Code
enforcement:codex_terms.description: All code must be production-ready from the first commit.

enforcement:codex_terms.title: No Patches/Boiler/Stubs/Bridge Code
enforcement:codex_terms.description: Prohibit temporary patches and boilerplate code.

enforcement:codex_terms.title: Prevent Infinite Loops
enforcement:codex_terms.description: Guarantee termination in all iterative processes.
